results.label: Integration: Pipeline
results.stdout:

▶ Integration: Stemmer → WORD_TO_SIGN → VOCAB_EXT fallback chain
  ✔ step 1 — direct WORD_TO_SIGN hit skips stemmer (0.1698ms)
  ✔ step 2 — stemmer finds root in WORD_TO_SIGN (studying → study → STUDY) (0.1273ms)
  ✔ step 3 — vocab-10k word resolves to THINK sign (0.135ms)
  ✔ step 4 — POS fallback when nothing found (adjective suffix → __MODIFIER) (0.3648ms)
  ✔ step 5 — fingerspell as final fallback for truly unknown words (0.3921ms)
✔ Integration: Stemmer → WORD_TO_SIGN → VOCAB_EXT fallback chain (1.4642ms)

  ✔ WH-question: "what" moved to end AND expression = WH_QUESTION (0.2498ms)

✔ Integration: grammar reordering + expression marking (0.8408ms)

  ✔ "my name" → single NAME sign (phrase takes priority) (0.0838ms)
  ✔ longer sentence preserves phrase detection in context (0.244ms)
